description: Focus group: a moderated panel reacts to something and riffs off each other, then a facilitator reports the themes.

Staff `panelist` with 2 or more models — each reacts in their own voice AND builds on what earlier panelists said (real cross-talk, unlike a blind panel). Optionally add one or more `contrarian` to keep the group honest. A `facilitator` distills the discussion into themes, points of consensus, and dissent. Feed the thing under discussion via the prompt/context.

roles.description: React candidly in your own distinct voice. Say what you like, dislike, and would change — and respond to points earlier panelists raised (agree, push back, build on them).
Optional dissenting voice: challenge the emerging consensus and surface what the group is glossing over.
Guide the discussion: the main themes, where the panel agreed, where it split, and the most actionable takeaways.
